common.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.

common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} chats?

errorState.appCrashDescription: The interface hit a rendering error. The current page state may be incomplete; reloading usually restores it.
errorState.appCrashMobileDescription: The interface hit an error. Reload the page to continue.
errorState.configLoadFailedDescription: Configuration data is temporarily unavailable. Reload configuration or return home and continue other work.
errorState.roomNotFoundDescription: This agent room was not found. It may have been deleted, archived, or not synced by the current service yet.
errorState.routeNotFoundDescription: No page matches the current address. Return home or check whether the link is complete.
errorState.sessionNotFoundDescription: This session was not found. It may have been deleted, archived, or not synced by the current service yet.

browserDataSync.title: Sync Data
browserDataSync.settingsDescription: Sync data used by web sign-in from browsers or backups.
browserDataSync.summaryTitle: Start with data that can be migrated safely
browserDataSync.summaryDescription: This version syncs saved passwords from CSV files or detected Chromium-based browsers and imports verification codes from Authenticator standard backups. Password manager extensions will be connected as a later sync item.
browserDataSync.securityDescription: OneWorks does not silently read third-party password manager vaults, browser extension data, or 2FA secrets. Syncing passwords may ask for system permission to access the selected browser secure storage. Imported data is encrypted by desktop secure storage and kept on this device.

savedPasswords.title: Saved passwords
savedPasswords.description: Sync saved passwords from detected local browser profiles into the OneWorks encrypted vault. {{count}} passwords are saved.
savedPasswords.importSuccess: Synced {{imported}} passwords, updated {{updated}}, skipped {{skipped}}; {{duplicates}} duplicate accounts were handled by your choice, and {{failed}} could not be decrypted.
savedPasswords.importFailed: Failed to sync browser passwords. Make sure the browser is installed and system access to browser secure storage is allowed.
savedPasswords.importCsvSuccess: Imported {{imported}} passwords from CSV, updated {{updated}}, skipped {{skipped}}; {{duplicates}} duplicate accounts were handled by your choice.
savedPasswords.importCsvFailed: Failed to import the password CSV. Make sure the file contains standard columns such as url, username, and password.
savedPasswords.importSourceSuccess: Synced {{imported}} passwords from {{source}}, updated {{updated}}, skipped {{skipped}}; {{duplicates}} duplicate accounts were handled by your choice, and {{failed}} could not be decrypted.
savedPasswords.importSourceFailed: Failed to sync {{source}} passwords. Make sure the browser is installed and system access to browser secure storage is allowed.
savedPasswords.desktopRestartRequired: Restart the desktop app to load the new password import capability.
savedPasswords.csvDescription: Import passwords from a CSV file exported by Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari, or a password manager.
savedPasswords.sourceDescription: {{profiles}} profiles detected. Sync saved passwords from local {{source}} profiles.
savedPasswords.sourceFallbackDescription: If {{source}} is installed on this device, you can try syncing saved passwords from the default profile.
savedPasswords.unavailable: Saved password management is only available in the desktop app
savedPasswords.passwordSectionDescription: Create, save, and manage passwords to sign in to websites and apps.
savedPasswords.authenticationFailed: Password confirmation failed. Password details were not opened.
savedPasswords.authenticationUnavailable: System password confirmation is unavailable on this device, so password details cannot be opened.
savedPasswords.timeoutDescription: To keep your passwords secure, OneWorks password management locks after {{minutes}} minutes of inactivity.
savedPasswords.passwordEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current password
savedPasswords.deleteConfirmDescription: This account cannot be restored from saved passwords after deletion.
savedPasswords.settingsOfferToSaveTitle: Offer to save passwords and verification codes
savedPasswords.settingsOfferToSaveDescription: The saved-data prompt policy is kept for web sign-in flows.
savedPasswords.settingsAutoSignInDescription: The auto-fill policy is kept after a matching account is found.
savedPasswords.settingsRequireAuthTitle: Confirm identity before viewing or copying passwords
savedPasswords.settingsRequireAuthDescription: Entering details, showing, or copying passwords stays protected by short system authentication.
savedPasswords.settingsCsvImportDescription: Import from a CSV file exported by a browser or password manager. Duplicate accounts ask whether to overwrite or skip.
savedPasswords.settingsImportDescription: Sync from local browser profiles. Duplicate accounts ask whether to overwrite or skip.
savedPasswords.settingsImportSourceDescription: {{profiles}} profiles detected. Duplicate accounts ask whether to overwrite or skip.
savedPasswords.settingsImportSourceFallbackDescription: If {{source}} is installed on this device, you can try syncing from the default profile. Restart the desktop app if syncing still fails.
savedPasswords.settingsAuthCacheDescription: Authentication is kept only in current desktop process memory and expires automatically.

passwordManagerExtensions.title: Password manager extensions
passwordManagerExtensions.description: Sync enabled state for password manager extensions such as 1Password and Bitwarden. Secrets stay managed by each extension.

authenticator.title: Verification codes / Authenticator
authenticator.description: Import one-time verification codes from an Authenticator standard backup. {{count}} verification codes are saved.
authenticator.importFailed: Failed to import the verification-code backup. Make sure the file contains standard otpauth:// records.

history.title: History
history.emptyFiltered: No history matches the current filters
history.unavailable: History is only available in the desktop app

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.emptyFiltered: No downloads match the current filters
downloads.unavailable: Downloads are only available in the desktop app

nativeHistoryImport.title: Imported history is ready
nativeHistoryImport.description: Found {{count}} {{adapters}} history sessions for this project. Open one to review it.
nativeHistoryImport.emptyDescription: No Codex or Claude Code history sessions were found for the current project.
nativeHistoryImport.failedDescription: Try again later, or check the local Codex / Claude Code history directories.

quickEntry.title: Import current project history
quickEntry.description: Review candidate sessions and file sizes from local Codex and Claude Code history before importing.

manager.importDescription: Preview candidate file sizes per platform first, then manually import a platform. Only history for this project or the same Git project is matched.
manager.globalAutoImportDescription: Default automatic import setting for all adapters. Per-adapter settings take precedence.
manager.globalSizeLimitDescription: Skip history files above this size during automatic import. Leave empty for no limit.
manager.adapterAutoImportOverride: This adapter uses its own switch, which takes precedence over the global setting.
manager.adapterAutoImportInherited: This adapter inherits the global setting: {{state}}.
manager.previewDescription: Shows history sessions that can be imported for this project. Only metadata and file sizes are read.
manager.previewPending: Candidate scan has not finished yet
manager.previewSummary: Scanned {{scanned}} history files, matched {{files}} candidates, total {{total}}, largest {{largest}}, {{largeFiles}} large files.
manager.searchPlaceholder: Search title, folder, or source file
manager.codexThreadLinkCopied: Codex thread link copied to clipboard
manager.emptyCandidates: No {{platform}} history sessions were found for this project
manager.autoSkippedSizeTooltip: Exceeds the automatic import size limit, so auto import skips this file. Manual import is still available. Size: {{size}}
manager.resultPending: No import has been run from this page yet. Existing external sessions for this project are listed below.
manager.resultSummary: Matched {{files}} history files, linked {{sessions}} sessions, and added {{events}} events.
manager.emptySessions: No imported external sessions for this project

moduleUpdates.title: Check Updates
moduleUpdates.installSuccess: {{name}} {{version}} was written to the runtime cache
moduleUpdates.allInstallFailed: Failed to install all module updates
moduleUpdates.changelogSummaryIntro: This update will install **{{count}} modules**. The changes below are grouped by feature updates and fixes. They are written to the runtime cache first and take effect after the matching runtime restarts or a new session starts.
moduleUpdates.changelogSummaryMoreItems: {{count}} more items. Open the full changelog for details.
moduleUpdates.changelogSummaryDetailHint: Available package changelogs have been merged into this summary.
moduleUpdates.changelogSummaryMissingHint: No package-level changelog was found for the exact version ranges, so this summary was generated from groups and version ranges.
moduleUpdates.changelogMissing: No changelog was found for this version range.
moduleUpdates.reviewModulesIntro: This update affects **{{count}} modules**. The module groups and version changes are listed below.
moduleUpdates.reviewModulesDescription: View affected modules and version changes
moduleUpdates.reviewChangelogIntro: Raw package changelogs included in this update are listed below.

activation.newSession: New sessions use the cached version after update.
activation.restart: Restart the corresponding runtime after update.

create.label: Create panel content
create.customDescription: {{entry}} injects this menu item and can replace it with any renderer.

routeSlot.title: Route slot
routeSlot.description: {{route}} passes only the path and selected item to the external renderer instead of owning page content.

activeItem.title: Selected item
activeItem.description: {{item}} is written to the URL from the left list, and the right side swaps independent content from it.

headerState.title: Header mode
headerState.description: The current detail component is {{component}}, so title, breadcrumbs, and right actions can be configured separately.

containerPadding.title: Container spacing
containerPadding.description: The page top spacing reuses header tokens to avoid maintaining header and content sizes separately.

componentSwitch.title: Content switch
componentSwitch.description: {{item}} renders from test data configuration and stays decoupled from the route container layout.

sidebarLink.title: Sidebar entry
sidebarLink.description: {{route}} can override list data, filters, and context menus from entry configuration.

filterState.title: Filter state
filterState.description: The current item carries its own filter tokens, while each entry can configure multiple filter groups.

contextActions.title: Context actions
contextActions.description: Context menus and batch actions come from the entry action list; the generic List only triggers them.

batchSelection.title: Batch selection
batchSelection.description: When multi-select is active, pages can mount their own batch actions without teaching List business meaning.

itemRenderer.title: Item renderer
itemRenderer.description: List item icons, actions, meta, and children come from external render configuration.

scrollTrace.title: Scroll check {{count}}
scrollTrace.description: Mock content for {{route}} / {{item}} to verify fixed header behavior, body scrolling, and bottom spacing.

requests.label: Request Entry
requests.description: Collect conversations, reviews, and ad hoc work.

resources.label: Resource Entry
resources.description: Gather docs, design assets, and API references.

operations.label: Operations Entry
operations.description: Track recurring tasks, checks, and regression queues.

requestCheckout.title: Checkout experience alignment
requestCheckout.description: Map the core desktop and web steps.

requestCheckoutCopy.title: Empty state copy pass
requestCheckoutCopy.description: Replace temporary text with reusable copy.

requestPluginAudit.title: Plugin action audit
requestPluginAudit.description: Cover install, disable, and error paths.

requestNavigationRefresh.title: Navigation structure review
requestNavigationRefresh.description: Align sidebar switching with the right container.

assetDesignSystem.title: Design system references
assetDesignSystem.description: Component states, spacing, and color references.

assetCopyDeck.title: Standard copy cards
assetCopyDeck.description: Reusable titles, hints, and empty states.

assetApiCatalog.title: API catalog
assetApiCatalog.description: Map page entries to server contracts.

opsNightlyRun.title: Nightly sync task
opsNightlyRun.description: Collect data status and generate a summary.

opsDataSnapshot.title: Data snapshot
opsDataSnapshot.description: Pull key state and incremental records.

opsDigestPublish.title: Digest publish
opsDigestPublish.description: Generate the sync summary and send it to the entry.

opsReviewLoop.title: Review loop
opsReviewLoop.description: Track waiting, blocked, and done states.

opsTriageQueue.title: Triage queue
opsTriageQueue.description: Sort outside feedback into the right entry.

opsArchiveSweep.title: Archive sweep
opsArchiveSweep.description: Organize done items and retain links.

tips.quickFind: Tip: quick search jumps straight to actions, sessions, and files.
tips.dragFiles: Drop files into the composer to skip typing long paths.
tips.newWindow: Right-click a session to open it in a new window for side-by-side work.
tips.slashCommand: Type / to find common commands and workflows.
tips.sidePanel: When the sidebar is collapsed, the top bar takes over navigation.
tips.terminal: The bottom panel keeps terminals and web tabs where you left them.
tips.context: Referencing exact files means fewer guesses and better context.
tips.glass: If you can see the skeleton through the glass, the frontend is waking up.

workspaceConnection.busyDescription: Background restart was skipped to avoid interrupting work in progress. Finish or stop these sessions, then retry.
workspaceConnection.mobileVersionConflictSummary: The service version differs. Restart the workspace server or retry later.
workspaceConnection.restartFailed: Failed to restart the workspace server
workspaceConnection.versionConflictDescription: This page and the running workspace server come from different versions. Client-only or compatible server edits can reuse the workspace server; restart the workspace server when the runtime compatibility versions differ.

currentProject.title: Show current project

footerHints.label: Keyboard actions for the selected item

auth.title: Sign in to OneWorks
auth.subtitle: Use a configured account to continue into this workspace.
auth.statusFailedHelp: Make sure the backend service is still running, then retry.
auth.statusTimeout: Timed out while loading sign-in status. Make sure the backend service is still running, then retry.
auth.generatedPasswordDescription: Find the password in the local password file, or configure fixed accounts in webAuth.accounts.

serverConnection.title: Connect your backend
serverConnection.subtitle: Start the backend on the computer running OneWorks, then paste the service address shown in the terminal.
serverConnection.desktopSubtitle: The desktop app already started a local service on this device. You can also connect to other OneWorks backends and switch execution environments from the same Electron app.
serverConnection.setupDescription: Copy the http or https address shown in the terminal. For advanced network setups, see
serverConnection.localServiceBannerDescription: Electron started this local service automatically on the current device, so no extra sign-in is required.
serverConnection.localServiceProfileDescription: Local service started automatically by Electron
serverConnection.serverUrlPlaceholder: Paste the service address from the terminal
serverConnection.invalidUrl: Enter a valid http or https address
serverConnection.connectionFailed: Could not connect to that backend service. Make sure it is running and allows cross-origin requests.
serverConnection.unsupportedServerVersion: This backend version is not supported. The PWA version is {{clientVersion}}, and the backend version is {{serverVersion}}.
serverConnection.profileDescriptionPlaceholder: For example, Tailscale private network or desktop at home
serverConnection.clearLoginStateConfirm: Only clears the sign-in state saved in this browser.
serverConnection.removeProfileConfirm: Removes this record and its local sign-in state.

automation.title: Automation
automation.basicDesc: Describe purpose and toggle the rule on or off
automation.cronInputHint: Enter cron directly, or use weekly fields below to generate one
automation.emptyLandingDescription: Choose a common task to fill the sender below, or describe the trigger and the work to run. Sending starts a chat where AI can call tools to create it.
automation.emptyLandingPlaceholder: Describe the automation you want to create
automation.emptyLandingAttachmentInstruction: Create an automation from the context I attached. Prefer calling the available automation tools to create it; if required details are missing, ask for the missing configuration first.
automation.starterDailyDescription: Summarize progress, risks, and next steps on a schedule.
automation.starterDailyPrompt: Help me create an automation: every weekday at 9:00 AM, check the current project status and summarize yesterday's completed work, today's risks, and suggested next steps. Please use the available automation tools to create it.
automation.starterHealthDescription: Run periodic checks and report when something breaks.
automation.starterHealthPrompt: Help me create an automation: every 30 minutes, check whether the current project has failing tests, build errors, or service issues. If there is a problem, create a session explaining the cause and suggested fixes. Please use the available automation tools to create it.
automation.starterWeeklyDescription: Collect progress, open issues, and planning notes each week.
automation.starterWeeklyPrompt: Help me create an automation: every Friday at 5:30 PM, summarize this week's development progress, solved issues, unfinished work, and recommendations for next week. Please use the available automation tools to create it.
automation.starterReminderDescription: Remind me or check specific items at the right time.
automation.starterReminderPrompt: Help me create an automation: every weekday at 6:00 PM, check whether there are unresolved todos, waiting inputs, or failed tasks, then create a session reminding me to handle them. Please use the available automation tools to create it.

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.sidebarHint: Choose a category and case, inspect the task goal, and launch a run.

chat.gitCommitMessagePlaceholderAmend: Leave blank to keep the latest commit message
chat.gitCommitMessageAmendHint: Leave it blank to reuse the latest commit message.
chat.gitCommitNoChanges: There are no changes to commit
chat.gitCommitNoStagedChanges: There are no staged changes to commit
chat.gitAmendUnavailable: There is no commit available to amend
chat.gitForcePushDescription: Use force-with-lease for the remote branch.
chat.gitForcePushHint: Only replaces it when the remote has no newer commits.
chat.gitPushNeedsSyncOrForce: This branch is behind upstream. Sync first or enable force push.
chat.gitPushPanelUpstreamHint: The first push sets the upstream automatically.
chat.deleteSessionDesc: This will permanently remove the session and all messages. Proceed carefully.

messageActions.editInProgress: A message is already being edited. Send or cancel it first.
messageActions.recallConfirmContent: Messages after this point will be rolled back. Continue?
messageActions.forkConfirmContent: This will create a new session branch from this message. Continue?

messageFooter.copyTimestampTitle: Double-click to copy the ISO timestamp and log the message payload

chat.hint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line, type / @ # for completion

newSessionGuide.welcomeMessage: Welcome back. Describe what you want to move forward, or start with an action template below.

workspaces.title: Existing Workspaces
workspaces.empty: No workspaces found. Configure workspaces in .oo.config.json.

chat.title: Title
chat.newSessionPlaceholder: Type a message to start a new chat...

pluginStore.title: Plugin Marketplace
pluginStore.subtitle: Manage installed workspace plugins, or create a new plugin quickly through chat.
pluginStore.enabledHint: Disabled plugins do not load client entries, server entries, or contributions in this workspace. They stay in the list so they can be enabled again.
pluginStore.pluginEnabledUpdateFailed: Failed to update plugin enabled state
pluginStore.watchHint: Watch this plugin directory, reload the plugin runtime after file changes, and notify the frontend to reload that plugin.
pluginStore.createLandingDescription: Pick a common plugin type to prefill the composer, or describe the entry point, interaction, and files you want to extend. Sending starts a session where AI creates the plugin using the repository structure.
pluginStore.createLandingPlaceholder: Describe the plugin you want to create
pluginStore.createLandingAttachmentInstruction: Create a OneWorks plugin from the context I attached. Prefer using create-plugin / plugin-creator capabilities and implement it using the current repository plugin structure. If required details are missing, ask for the missing configuration first.
pluginStore.starterChatActionDescription: Add a button, menu item, or quick command to the chat page.
pluginStore.starterChatActionPrompt: Help me create a plugin: add an action button to the chat header that runs a custom command when clicked. Use the current repository plugin structure, including a client entry and manifest configuration.
pluginStore.starterLauncherDescription: Add custom search results or commands to the launcher.
pluginStore.starterLauncherPrompt: Help me create a plugin: add a launcher search provider that returns custom command results for the typed query and supports invoking a result.
pluginStore.starterWorkbenchDescription: Add a plugin tab to the bottom or right workbench panel.
pluginStore.starterWorkbenchPrompt: Help me create a plugin: register a new workbench panel tab and render custom client-side content in it.
pluginStore.starterRouteDescription: Add a standalone plugin route and matching client view.
pluginStore.starterRoutePrompt: Help me create a plugin: register a standalone plugin page route and implement a renderable client view.

conflict.title: Configuration changed elsewhere
conflict.description: {{source}} / {{target}} was updated outside this page while you still have unsaved edits.
conflict.instructions: Choose which version to keep before continuing so the two copies do not overwrite each other.

detail.inheritedReadonly: This value comes from an extended config. Override it here before editing.
detail.inheritedAppendOnly: This item comes from an extended config. This collection merges by append, so edit it in the source config or override the whole collection here.
detail.partialOverride: This entry overrides an inherited config. Fields not set locally still come from the inherited layer.

modelProviderDescriptions.openai: Official OpenAI API platform for GPT models and multimodal services.
modelProviderDescriptions.anthropic: Official Anthropic Console service for Claude models.
modelProviderDescriptions.moonshot-cn: Moonshot/Kimi China official OpenAI-compatible API service.
modelProviderDescriptions.moonshot-intl: Moonshot/Kimi international official OpenAI-compatible API service.
modelProviderDescriptions.kimi-code: Kimi Code membership benefit endpoint for coding agents.
modelProviderDescriptions.minimax: Official MiniMax API platform for chat, multimodal, and agent services.
modelProviderDescriptions.minimax-token-plan: MiniMax Token Plan subscription endpoint for MiniMax M-series coding models.
modelProviderDescriptions.qwen: Alibaba Cloud Bailian/DashScope API service for Qwen models.
modelProviderDescriptions.qwen-coding-plan: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Coding Plan endpoint for coding agents.
modelProviderDescriptions.zhipu: Zhipu BigModel official API service for GLM models.
modelProviderDescriptions.zhipu-coding-plan: Zhipu GLM Coding Plan endpoint for supported coding tools.
modelProviderDescriptions.tencent-tokenhub-coding-plan: Tencent Cloud TokenHub Coding Plan endpoint for coding agents.
modelProviderDescriptions.volcengine-ark-coding-plan: Volcengine Ark Coding Plan endpoint for coding agents.
modelProviderDescriptions.baidu-qianfan-coding-plan: Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan endpoint for coding agents.
modelProviderDescriptions.azure-openai: Azure-hosted OpenAI model deployments managed through Azure AI Foundry.
modelProviderDescriptions.google-gemini: Google AI Studio and Gemini API service.
modelProviderDescriptions.aws-bedrock: AWS Bedrock managed foundation model service.
modelProviderDescriptions.openrouter: OpenRouter model routing platform with OpenAI-compatible APIs.
modelProviderDescriptions.vercel-ai-gateway: Vercel AI Gateway for routing requests across model providers.
modelProviderDescriptions.requesty: Requesty AI gateway for OpenAI-compatible model routing.
modelProviderDescriptions.portkey: Portkey AI gateway for managing and routing model traffic.
modelProviderDescriptions.litellm: LiteLLM gateway and proxy for unified model APIs.
modelProviderDescriptions.micu: Micu relay platform for OpenAI-compatible model access.
modelProviderDescriptions.apiyi: APIYI relay platform for OpenAI-compatible model access.
modelProviderDescriptions.yunwu: Yunwu relay platform for OpenAI-compatible model access.

aiAssist.label: Create with AI
aiAssist.prompt:
I want to create a speech-to-text service configuration for One Works.

Please first ask me for the provider, endpoint URL, authentication method, model name, language, audio format limits, and response JSON structure.
Then generate JSON that can be written to the One Works voice.speechToText configuration format.

Constraints:
- Do not write API keys in plain text in project config; prefer environment variable references.
- Use lowercase kebab-case service ids.
- For OpenAI-compatible APIs, use provider openai-transcriptions.
- For custom HTTP APIs, use provider custom-http and include request/response mappings.
- End with test steps and troubleshooting suggestions.
